Rationale: B2G Route Bypasses Chicken-and-Egg Problem
Rationale: Extension Reads Public Disclosures Without Service Cooperation

Rationale: Rounded but Not Bubbly (Friendly Precision)
Rationale: Animation Communicates State Change, Not Decoration
Rationale: Light Mode Only — Demo-safe, Projector-friendly
